"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y)</span></p>

point =</span> <span style=

new</span> <span style=

GeoNormalize()

Shifts longitudes, if need be, into a continuous range of 360 degrees.

virtual void GeoNormalize()

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double)

Normalizes longitudes into a continuous range containing the longitude. This method is obsolete.

virtual void GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double Longitude)

Parameters

Longitude double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometriesChanged()

Tells this geometry collection that some of its geometries have been altered. Use this method on polylines, polygons and multipatches after directly editing one of its parts.

virtual void GeometriesChanged()

Examples

Sample Snippet

InsertPoints(int, int, ref IPoint)

dy double

Point[int]

Parameters

i int

Returns

IPoint

Sample Snippet

<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
<img src="./bitmaps/point.gif" align="baseline"></span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">public</span> <span style="COLOR: blue">static</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>
GetPointGeometry()</span></span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint3D(x, y, z);</span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
MakeZAware(point <span style="COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>);</span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> point <span style=
"COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
static</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=

PointCount

The number of points in the collection.

virtual int PointCount { get; }

Returns

int

Sample Snippet

PointIDAware

Indicates whether or not the geometry is aware of and capable of handling PointIDs.

virtual bool PointIDAware { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

PointIDSimple

Indicates if all PointID values for this geometry are well-defined. Only works if geometry is aware of PointIDs.

virtual bool PointIDSimple { get; }

Returns

bool

QueryGeometries(int, int, out IGeometry)

Populates the array with references to a sub-sequence of geometries. This method is intended for internal use only.

Index int
Count int
geometries IGeometry

SetGeometries(int, ref IGeometry)

Replaces all geometries in the collection with the specified number of references to those in the input array. This method is intended for internal use only.

Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

SetPoints(int, ref IPoint)

Replaces all existing vertices of this Path, Ring, Polyline, or Polygon with copies of the input points; or all existing points of this Multipoint, TriangleFan, or TriangleStrip with references to the input points (for C++ and VB users only).

virtual void SetPoints(int Count, ref IPoint newPoints)

Count int
newPoints IPoint
